table_name: Star dataset to predict star types
description: Data loaded from CSV file: 192.csv (Dataset: Star dataset to predict star types)
dataset_name: Star dataset to predict star types

fields.name: Temperature (K)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the surface temperature of stars measured in Kelvin, indicating their thermal energy and spectral classification in astronomy.

fields.name: Luminosity(L/Lo)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the luminosity of stars, measured as a ratio compared to the Sun's luminosity, indicating how much energy each star emits relative to the Sun in the context of stellar classification.

fields.name: Radius(R/Ro)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the radius of a star expressed as a multiple of the Sun’s radius (R☉), quantifying star sizes for comparative astronomical analysis.

fields.name: Absolute magnitude(Mv)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the intrinsic brightness of stars, measured as their absolute magnitude, indicating how luminous they would appear from a standard distance in astronomical studies.

fields.name: Star type
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the categorical classification of stars into six distinct types, with each integer value (0-5) indicating a specific star category in the context of astronomical star classification.

fields.name: Star color
fields.sample_values: Blue, Blue , Blue White, Blue white, Blue white , ..., Yellowish, Yellowish White, white, yellow-white, yellowish
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the observed color classification of stars, indicating their surface temperature and spectral characteristics in the context of astronomical star type prediction.

fields.name: Spectral Class
fields.sample_values: A, B, F, G, K, M, O
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates the spectral classification of a star, categorizing it by temperature and color based on the standard astronomical types (O, B, A, F, G, K, M).

formatted_summary:
## Table 1: Star_dataset_to_predict_star_types (240 rows × 7 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 192.csv (Dataset: Star dataset to predict star types)

### Schema (7 fields)
  - Temperature (K) -- type: int64, values: 1939, 2600, 2621, 2637, 2650, ..., 37882, 38234, 38940, 39000, 40000
  - Luminosity(L/Lo) -- type: float64, values: 8e-05, 8.5e-05, 0.00011, 0.000138, 0.00014, ..., 748890.0, 783930.0, 813000.0, 834042.0, 849420.0
  - Radius(R/Ro) -- type: float64, values: 0.0084, 0.0087, 0.00878, 0.00879, 0.0089, ..., 1673.0, 1679.0, 1779.0, 1783.0, 1948.5
  - Absolute magnitude(Mv) -- type: float64, values: -11.92, -11.75, -11.39, -11.36, -11.33, ..., 19.56, 19.63, 19.94, 20.02, 20.06
  - Star type -- type: int64, values: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
  - Star color -- type: object, values: Blue, Blue , Blue White, Blue white, Blue white , ..., Yellowish, Yellowish White, white, yellow-white, yellowish
  - Spectral Class -- type: object, values: A, B, F, G, K, M, O
